caption: In a large, indoor hall featuring recessed ceiling lighting and ornate chandeliers, several people practice martial arts on a blue mat. A man wearing a blue traditional outfit is the focal point, performing a sequence of movements. In the beginning, he stands with one arm extended, then transitions into a deep, wide squat with his arms out to the sides. He then rises and rotates his body, shifting his weight as he moves his arms upward. Finally, he lunges forward and low to the ground, extending his lead leg. Other practitioners are visible in the background, some wearing white outfits and others in dark or red clothing, performing similar synchronized movements. A crowd of spectators sits in the background, watching the demonstration. The setting remains constant as the practitioners move through their choreographed forms.
